fixes.title: Streaming auto-start fix
fixes.description: Fixed streaming playback not auto-starting when selected

fixes.title: Playlist skipping resolved
fixes.description: Fixed issues with playlist navigation and item skipping

fixes.title: Update checker improvements
fixes.description: Enhanced update check reliability and error handling

improvements.title: UI polish
improvements.description: Various UI improvements and visual refinements

fixes.title: Black screen with audio-only playback
fixes.description: Video surface now properly attaches during recomposition, resolving SurfaceView detachment that occurred when PlayerScreen recomposed rapidly

fixes.title: Status bar gap flash on player entry
fixes.description: Moved system bar hiding logic before first frame rendering to eliminate visible theme color flash/gap on player entry

fixes.title: Edge-to-edge layout corruption
fixes.description: Removed incorrect setDecorFitsSystemWindows(window, true) onDispose to preserve app-wide edge-to-edge layout consistency

fixes.title: Orientation conflict loop
fixes.description: Changed SCREEN_ORIENTATION_SENSOR_LANDSCAPE to SCREEN_ORIENTATION_SENSOR to allow sensor detection of both orientations and eliminate feedback loop

fixes.title: Dual volume HUD appearance
fixes.description: Removed AudioManager.FLAG_SHOW_UI flag when adjusting volume to prevent system volume HUD from appearing alongside custom HUD

improvements.title: Enhanced caption auto-selection
improvements.description: Automatically selects first available caption track when captions are enabled

improvements.title: Improved queue navigation
improvements.description: Better navigation between queue items using proper NavController patterns with back stack handling

changes.description: Removed remember() pattern causing SurfaceView detachment during recomposition
Moved controller.hide() before first frame render to prevent status bar flash
Removed AudioManager.FLAG_SHOW_UI to prevent system volume HUD

improvements.title: In-app updates + changelog
improvements.description: Added complete App Updates screen with GitHub release checking, download progress, and Changelog screen with categorized release notes

improvements.title: Better format selection UX
improvements.description: Separated formats into Video (merges with audio) and Video + Audio (pre-merged) with improved sorting

improvements.title: Download engine quality + compatibility
improvements.description: Compatibility mode prefers MP4/H.264 + M4A/AAC, smarter merge container selection

improvements.title: Settings integration
improvements.description: About screen includes shortcuts to App Updates and Changelog

fixes.title: Subscription sync retry behavior
fixes.description: Worker now retries only for transient network failures to prevent infinite loops
